title: carve-harness 요구사항
summary: Defines the requirements the carve-harness CLI must satisfy: detection-driven interactive harness install, core components, Squad subagents, lifecycle commands, distribution, and quality gates.
notes: Type set from MANIFEST_TYPE=SPEC (authoritative). Document mixes requirement-style language (R-INSTALL, R-LIFECYCLE, goals/non-goals) with implementation contracts (component lists, hook event bindings, coverage thresholds); manifest override resolves toward SPEC.
